note: 'Improved sanitation facilities' include flush/pour flush toilets (which flush to a piped sewer system, septic tank or pit latrine), ventilated improved pit latrines, pit latrines with slabs, and composting toilets.
title: People in rural areas not using improved sanitation facilities
subtitle: People not using [improved sanitation facilities](#dod:improved-sanitation) might practice [open defecation](#dod:sanitation-open-defecation) or use [unimproved sanitation facilities](#dod:sanitation-unimproved).
selectedEntityNames: Latin America and the Caribbean (UN SDG)
Northern Africa and Western Asia (UN SDG)
